creator: marcin.nowak@simplusnet.pl
text:
Why? Why? Why? Why in express mode installation I have to choice mount points, configure network, NFS, etc... In express mode should be: partition choice, installation mode (minimal, kernel developer, desktop, etc. now is ok) and set a root password. That's all. That is express mode IMO.

Greetz (-:

Marcin Nowak and all of my friends.
